problem.title: Selection Sort
problem.description: Implement selection sort algorithm to sort an array in ascending order.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Selection Sort Implementation
solutions.description: Selection sort repeatedly finds the minimum element in the unsorted portion of the array and swaps it into its correct position, growing the sorted prefix one element at a time. It always performs O(n²) comparisons regardless of input order, making it inefficient on large lists. The key advantage is that it makes at most O(n) swaps, which is useful when write operations are costly.
